steps.assistant_text: IDENTIFIED: osLeoDiskInit (io/leodiskinit.c verbatim). Splat's 'descriptor initializer' fragment 6F038 (the old CAP) was this fn's HOISTED HEAD — 5.3 schedules six LeoDiskHandle stores before the addiu-sp prologue (true entry 0x6F044). Extern-struct per-store own-lui + TU-defined 2-byte PgsRls pair for the shared-$at sb pair (D_00000006_leopgs resolves %lo +6/+7).
